name: Public Holiday Hours Inquiry
description: Patient inquires about the clinic's hours on an upcoming public holiday.
goal: Find out if the clinic is open on Memorial Day and the operating hours if so.
behavior: Express understanding of potential holiday closures
Politely ask for any alternative dates if closed
success_criteria: Agent must correctly state if the clinic is open or closed on the public holiday
Agent should provide the specific holiday hours if open
Agent should offer alternative options or suggestions if closed
orchestrator_hint: Patient asks about clinic hours on a public holiday.
